name: 6th District Elementary School
description: 6th District Elementary School is a place to play pickleball in Covington, KY. There are 2 indoor wood courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Five Seasons Sports Club
description: Come play pickleball at Five Seasons Sports Club in Crestview Hills, KY! There are 22 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include lights and restrooms.

name: Freedom Park
description: Freedom Park is a place to play pickleball in Crestview Hills, KY. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: General ormsby park
description: General ormsby park is a place to play pickleball in Fort Mitchell, KY. There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Memorial Park
description: Memorial Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Independence, KY. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Pioneer Park
description: Pioneer Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Covington, KY. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Richardson Road Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Richardson Road Pickleball Courts in Erlanger, KY! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Scott High School
description: Come play pickleball at Scott High School in Taylor Mill, KY! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: The Grove
description: The Grove courts are only available for open adult league play on Sunday nights. All other days, the gymnasium is utilized by our preschool and basketball programs.
